post.message: Team, I just received updated sales figures for last quarter. We saw a 15% growth compared to the previous quarter. Good job everyone!
I've been looking into our competitors' recent marketing strategies. It seems like they're heavily investing in social media campaigns. We should consider increasing our online presence.
I agree with you, Ryan. We need to explore new ways to reach potential customers. Let's have a brainstorming session next week to discuss this.
Ryan, I've compiled a report on the latest EV market trends. It seems like there's a growing demand for more affordable options. We're perfectly positioned to capitalize on this trend.
That's great to hear, John. We should discuss this in our next team meeting. I'll add it to the agenda.
Hey team, as part of the new branding initiative, can anyone tell me how many of our staff have updated their ID photos this year? We may need to push a little more if the number is low.
Hi Jane, I just checked with HR. We have a pretty good turnout. Approximately 79% of employees have updated their ID photos this year.
